sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Kuenzli Pond, Hatchery Outpond 1, Hatchery Outpond 2 and Hatchery Outpond 3. Season: First Saturday in May. Daily: 3 game fish of which not more than 1 may be black bass. Possession: 6 game fish of which not more than 2 may be black bass. Hours: 8 AM to sunset.

sources.title: Mason Valley Hatchery Outponds — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: There are a total of six ponds of which four are open to fishing for one day a year, the first Saturday in May. The four open ponds include Kuenzli Pond, Hatchery Outpond 1, Hatchery Outpond 2, and Hatchery Outpond 3. The ponds are stocked with Rainbow Trout prior to May each year... Largemouth Bass also inhabit the ponds and occasionally are caught. The Yerington Lions Club hosts a kids fishing derby on the first Saturday of May, annually.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Lyon County — Mason Valley WMA: Kuenzli Pond, Hatchery Outpond 1, 2 and 3
regulations.humanSummary: Hatchery Outpond 3 is open to fishing on a single day per year: the first Saturday in May (a Yerington Lions Club youth derby), and is closed the rest of the year as it is used for hatchery water settling.

parameters.counting_rule: Daily limit is 3 game fish of which not more than 1 may be black bass. Possession limit is 6 game fish of which not more than 2 may be black bass.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Lyon County — Mason Valley WMA: Kuenzli Pond, Hatchery Outpond 1, 2 and 3
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit 3 game fish (max 1 black bass); possession limit 6 game fish (max 2 black bass).
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 3 game fish of which not more than 1 may be black bass. Possession: 6 game fish of which not more than 2 may be black bass.

parameters.note: 8 AM to sunset on the single open day.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Lyon County — Mason Valley WMA: Kuenzli Pond, Hatchery Outpond 1, 2 and 3
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is allowed from 8 AM to sunset on the open day.

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
